title: Notion 完全禁止了 Anthropic，并通过故意降低模型的方式让 Opus 4.8 成为趋势。
description: 与“基础设施失败”相比，人们似乎更愿意相信“模型被简化了”。
titleZh: Notion 完全禁止了 Anthropic，并通过故意降低模型的方式让 Opus 4.8 成为趋势。
titleEn: Notion completely banned Anthropic and sent Opus 4.8 trending by deliberately dumbing down the model. 12 hours later, it urgently clarified it was a typo.
descriptionZh: 与“基础设施失败”相比，人们似乎更愿意相信“模型被简化了”。
descriptionEn: Compared to "infrastructure failure," people seem more willing to believe that "the model was dumbed down."
